{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201701069848719DFFBBCAA01A0F"}"},"total":269},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7544872878274429720","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"评分怎么这么低啊！？甜文！！日常甜！！！甜的我心都要化了，除了反派角色，主配都是正常人！舒服！男主真的非常符合现代女性的理想型，这年头能看到个稍微有点正常的“霸总”实在是不容易！非常喜欢！女主的“迟钝”也很贴近生活，最后，男德男德 歪瑞古德！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756683780,"group_id":"7503806321095871550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9tkAFi0+luBO5OXrmW9axOK5ewdM4MfJZbs1hdbO2Hh","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/30c6c5ccaa344241ba79597e6ce58977~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528971&x-signature=9m%2BkxdT5uXVBSyYDMCphg8NDDb0%3D","user_id":"1764057216720956","user_name":"アヤミ"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1764057216720956","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503806321095871550","book_info":{"abstract":"【灵魂交换+甜宠+欢喜冤家+对抗路情侣+搞笑+双洁】
一觉醒来，宁愿和顶头上司互换身体了！
宁愿表示：莫慌！先让我看看大不大！
沈在野拒绝：我的身体只有我未来老婆能看！
·
为了不露馅儿，两个人只能搬到一起。
磨合过程中，发生了不少啼笑皆非的事。
·
宁愿无意间发现了互换身体的方法。
于是，属于沈在野的噩梦开始了。
经期痛经严重：换！
——沈在野痛的爬不起来床。
想吃美食大餐：换！
——沈在野天天住在健身房。
极品亲戚上门：换！
——沈在野骂骂咧咧把人赶走。
闺蜜想谈恋爱：换！
——沈在野一把捂住宁愿的嘴：“不行！这个不能换！”
宁愿失落：那好吧……
·
最开始，沈在野对宁愿各种嫌弃。
还放话，就算是从楼上跳下去也不会喜欢她。
然而他没想到，在相处过程中，自己的目光却不受控制地被她吸引。
沈在野：嗯，真香！
·
公司员工发现老板最近不太对劲。
时而骂人如疯狗，仿佛嘴上淬了毒；
时而温柔的过分，各种福利拿到手软。
他们暗暗祈祷：老板这病可千万别好！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o529acd50d6890dfdbffe1cbc78c1e430~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"容时","author_id":"","book_id":"7503806321095871550","book_name":"互换身体：毒舌老板他夜夜崩溃","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2211人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7503806604555321918","read_count":"2211","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"324180"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"156","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,幻想言情,甜宠,双洁,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ad1207a4a07cec81e44d2b3c02ed6ce7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181266&x-signature=yClvDMlMQpcaq92lMx7vwKK7hCg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2418515913212654","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"157"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201701069848719DFFBBCAA01A0F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count"
